summary: All 20 checks passed successfully. The landing page project has index.html, styles.css, and script.js in the root directory. HTML contains all required elements: header, nav, hero section, features section with 3 cards, footer, CTA button, and theme toggle button. CSS includes media queries for responsive design (768px and 1024px breakpoints), dark mode support via CSS custom properties, and theme variables. JavaScript implements dark mode toggle with localStorage persistence, system preference detection, and event listeners. HTML correctly references both styles.css and script.js, and uses data-theme attribute on the html element.
passed_checks: C11: CSS has dark mode support
C14: JS has theme switching logic
